name: 1080 Side Spin
description: 1080 unispin + leg wrap in same direction as unispin

name: 1080 Unispin
description: feet leave pedals, unicycle turns 1080 degrees relative to ground, feet land on pedals

name: 1260 Side Spin
description: 1260 unispin + leg wrap in same direction as unispin

name: 1260 Unispin
description: feet leave pedals, unicycle turns 1260 degrees relative to ground, feet land on pedals

name: 180 antiside spin
description: 180 unispin with a leg wrap in the opposite direction of the spin (if you do the wrap with your back leg, spin toward your front foot. If you do the wrap with your front leg, spin away from your front foot) *see note for the handpass variations 180 antisides
notes: There are three ways of doing a 180 antiside spin (three different handpasses). 1) seat out to seat in version that Pierre Sturney used for antiside flip variations. You spin the uni 180 degrees away from the leg doing the wrap, then pass the seat to your other hand as your leg wraps around the seat. 2) one handed seat out to seat in version that's more like wrapping your leg around the seat as you do an in-spin. Let go just before completing the wrap, land back on pedals. You may or may not grab the seat with your free hand for stabilization once you land. 3) Seat in to seat in version (one handed), basically a corona flip without the flip.

name: 180 anti backside spin
description: 180 backside spin but it spins the opposite direction (if you do the backside wrap around your back leg, then spin toward your front foot. if you do the backside wrap around your front leg, then spin away from your front foot)

name: 180 anti backside flip
description: 180 anti backside spin + crank flip

name: 180 anti backside double flip
description: 180 anti backside spin + double flip

name: 180 antiside overflip
description: 180 antiside spin followed by an overflip

name: 180 Back Flip
description: 180 flip with backwards wheel rotation

name: 180 body varial
description: your body spins 180 around the unicycle (so you are spinning a 180 unispin relative to you, but the unicycle stays in place relative to the ground)

name: 180 double back flip
description: 180 double flip with backwards wheel rotation

name: 180 Double Flip
description: 180 twist + double flip

name: 180 Flip
description: 180 twist + crank flip

name: 180 no-handed unispin
description: 180 unispin without using your hands (seat in to seat in)

name: 180 secret side spin
description: 180 unispin that wraps in front of one leg, behind both legs, and out from behind your other leg

name: 180 Quad Flip
description: 180 twist + quad flip

name: 180 Rev
description: 180 twist + rev

name: 180 Scissor Side Spin
description: 180 side around one leg followed by a side jump around the other leg

name: 180 side spin
description: 180 unispin where one leg wraps around the seat in the same direction as the spin

name: 180 stepover legaround
description: One foot on tire/crown, twist around body and make a wrap round the saddle with your foot at the same time
videoTimestamp: The very first thing in the combo

name: 180 Superman
description: Superman ending in a 180 unispin

name: 180 triple back flip
description: 180 triple flip with backwards wheel rotation

name: 180 Triple Flip
description: 180 twist + triple flip

name: 180 Twist
description: body and unicycle turn 180 degrees in the air relative to direction of travel
notes: One of the foundational tricks

name: 180 Unispin
description: feet leave pedals, unicycle turns 180 degrees relative to ground, feet land on pedals
notes: One of the foundational tricks

name: 270 antiside spin
description: 270 unispin with a leg wrap in the opposite direction of the spin (either from pedals to seat-in-back on tire, or from seat-in-front on tire down to pedals)

name: 270 Twist
description: body and unicycle turn 270 degrees in the air relative to direction of travel
notes: Term only used with going to or from a pedal/crank grab

name: 270 Unispin down
description: Spin the unicycle 270 degrees, land on unicycle (either from pedals up to tire, or, from tire down to pedals)

name: 360 antiside spin
description: 360 unispin with a leg wrap in the opposite direction of the spin *see note for the two handpass variations
notes: 360 antisides have been done with different handpasses. See these videos for other variations: https://youtu.be/eYGtxf5dkLI?si=br4rPDK09VDENGgL&t=53 and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_gx1zRkv61w and https://www.youtube.com/live/19rh-YyXJLM?si=39bNa7oN-53_BAuR&t=13286

name: 360 anti backside spin
description: 360 backside spin but it spins the opposite direction (if you do the backside wrap around your back leg, then spin toward your front foot. if you do the backside wrap around your front leg, then spin away from your front foot)

name: 360 back flip
description: 360 hop twist + back flip

name: 360 back rev
description: 360 hop twist + back rev

name: 360 body varial double flip
description: 360 body varial + double flip

name: 360 body varial
description: feet leave pedals, body turns 360 degree relative to unicycle, feet land on pedals

name: 360 body varial flip
description: 360 body varial + flip

name: 360 Dan Heaton
description: Dan Heaton trick, except with a 360 body varial

name: 360 flip
description: 360 twist + flip

name: 360 no-handed unispin
description: 360 unispin without using your hands

name: 360 Rev
description: 360 twist + rev

name: 360 Secret side spin
description: 360 unispin that wraps in front of one leg, behind both legs, and out from behind your other leg

name: 360 Side Spin
description: 360 unispin where one leg wraps around seat in same direction unicycle spins
notes: Felix Dietze landed a seat in front to seat in back version around the same time (0:29 in https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fKzUp2UkK-Q)

name: 360 Twist
description: body and unicycle turn 360 degrees in the air relative to direction of travel

name: 360 Unispin
description: feet leave pedals, unicycle turns 360 degrees relative to ground, feet land on pedals

name: 450 secret side down
description: 450 unispin that wraps in front of one leg, behind both legs, and out from behind your other leg

name: 450 Unispin down
description: 450 degree unispin from tire to pedals

name: 450 Unispin up
description: 450 degree unispin from pedals to tire

name: 540 antiside spin
description: 540 unispin with a leg wrap in the spin in the opposite direction of the wrap
notes: Fifth antiside flip was landed long before 540 antiside spin. Weird.

name: 540 secret side spin
description: 540 unispin that wraps in front of one leg, behind both legs, and out from behind your other leg

name: 540 Side Spin
description: 540 unispin where one leg wraps around the seat in the same direction that the unicycle spins

name: 540 Suicide Spin
description: 540 degree unispin out from behind one leg, in front of both legs, and around in front of the other leg (basically a backside followed by a side spin). the last 180 around the leg is slapped

name: 540 Twist
description: body and unicycle turn 540 degrees in the air relative to direction of travel

name: 540 Unispin
description: feet leave pedals, unicycle turns 540 degrees relative to ground (1.5 revolutions of unicycle spinning around vertical axis), feet land on pedals

name: 630 Secret Side spin down
description: 630 unispin starting from pedals that wraps in front of one leg, behind both legs, and out from behind your other leg, then you land on the tire

name: 630 secret side spin up
description: 630 unispin starting on tire that wraps in front of one leg, behind both legs, and out from behind your other leg, then you land on the pedals

name: 630 side spin down
description: 630 unispin around in front of one leg, from tire down to pedals

name: 630 side spin up
description: 630 unispin around in front of one leg, from pedals up to tire

name: 630 Unispin Down
description: 630 degree unispin from pedals to tire

name: 630 Unispin Up
description: 630 degree unispin from tire to pedals

name: 720 Secret side spin
description: 720 unispin that wraps in front of one leg, behind both legs, and out from behind your other leg (always done with a half flip, physically impossible to do without the half flip)

name: 720 Side Spin
description: 720 degree spin of the unicycle while it also travels around your leg

name: 720 Twist
description: body and unicycle turn 720 degrees in the air relative to direction of travel
notes: Landed in only one session, off a ledge

name: 720 Unispin
description: Two full revolutions of unicycle spinning around a vertical axel

name: 810 Unipsin down
description: 810 degree unispin from tire down to pedals

name: 810 Unispin up
description: 810 degree unispin from pedals to tire

name: 90 unispin down
description: spin unicycle 90 degrees from tire to down to pedals

name: 90 unispin up
description: spin unicycle 90 degrees from pedals up to tire

name: 900 Side Spin
description: 900 degree unispin around your leg

name: 900 Unispin
description: 900 unispin

name: 990 side spin up
description: 990 degree unispin + side jump, from pedals to tire

name: 990 unispin down
description: 990 degree unispin from tire to pedals

name: 900 unispin up
description: 990 degree unispin from pedals to tire

name: Anti
description: Anti added in front of side spin means the spin goes in the oposite direction as the wrap (clockwise spin for left leg front side, anticlockwise spin for left leg back side, and the oposites for the right leg)

name: Ayrton kick
description: Outside pedalkick

name: Back Crank Flip
description: feet leave pedals, wheel does 1 rotation backwards, feet land on pedals

name: Back Flip Over Flip
description: back flip + over flip

name: Back Flip Over Hick Flip
description: back flip, then kick front pedal and turn uni 180 to initiate hickflip
notes: Dan Colvin did it first, from seat in. Pierre does it seat out.

name: Back Rev
description: wheel leaves ground, feet pedal the wheel through one backward revolution, wheel lands on ground

name: Back Rev Rev
description: Back Rev then forward Rev before landing on the ground

name: Back Roll
description: back foot is on crank, free foot pushes back side of wheel 1/2 revolution on ground, free foot kicks/pushes tire so wheel revolves additional 1/2 revolution backwards while back foot leaves crarnk, both feet land on pedals/cranks
notes: Originally inside and back roll were used interchangeably, but in the end backroll was used more prominantly

name: Back roll flip
description: starts as a back roll but the second half revolution is replaced with a jump where the release of the foot on the tire and the foot on the crank creates a back crankflip, most oftenly 1,5 revolutions but also more and less happens (examples: backroll 3.5 flip, backroll double flip, or backrollflip refering to a one single revolution flip)

name: Back roll 2.5 flip
description: Back roll with 2.5 wheel rotation instead

name: Back roll 3.5 flip
description: Back roll with 3.5 wheel rotation instead

name: Back roll forward flip
description: starts as a back roll but the second half revolution is replaced with a jump where the release of the foot on the tire and the foot on the crank creates a forward crankflip

name: Back roll forward 2.5 flip
description: starts as a back roll but the second half revolution is replaced witha. jump where the release of the foot on the tire and the foot on the crank creates a forward crankflip that goes 2.5 revolutions

name: Back roll step over
description: starts as a back roll but after the first half revolution, front foot is placed behind the crown of the tire and the back foot is lifted over the seat and comes down to the opposite crank as the second half revolution is completed

name: Back scuff coast
description: One footed seat in front backward coasting (this one is generally easier than forward)

name: Backside
description: Opposite leg than a regular side

name: Back Slide
description: grind in which rider is facing backward
notes: Original version is in UNiVERsE

name: Back tire grab
description: Grabing the back of the tire with the hand during a hop

name: Backside jump
description: jump up, wrap leg around in front of seat then behind and land back on pedals

name: Backside double flip
description: backside jump + double crank flip

name: Backside flip
description: backside jump + crank flip

name: Backwards coasting
description: Coasting but riding backwards

name: Backwards one footed coasting
description: One footed coasting but backwards

name: Backwards wheel walk
description: Wheel walking but backwards

name: Backwards X Roll
description: start in outside position on back crank, half roll backward, cross free foot over the seat to outside position on the other crank, half roll backward, end on front crank in outside position

name: Bay Coast
description: feet leave pedals, wheel rolls on ground, feet land in bay position (feet on tire on either side of frame while rider remains seated), wheel rolls on ground, feet land on pedals

name: Bay Flip
description: feet leave pedals, feet land in bay position (feet on tire on either side of frame while rider remains seated), wheel does 1 revolution, feet land on pedals
notes: Bay in bay flip refers to the Bay Area of California, where the trick originated. The spelling Bae is Brundlespeak propogated by Alex Anderson

name: Bay Walk
description: Side walk in bay seat position

name: Beta flip
description: 180 twist + late outchange flip (rotating same direction)

name: Big flip
description: Big spin + flip

name: Big side flip
description: Big side spin + flip

name: Big side spin
description: Big spin + side

name: Big Spin
description: 360 unispin + 180 body varial in the same direction

name: Blind -
description: There are two definitions of Blind... 1) Twist, Spins, or Grinds opposite the rider's comfortable direction... 2) Twists or Spins in the direction away from the front foot
notes: For some riders, blind is their comfortable spinning direction, and for other more experienced riders, they are equally comfortable in both spinning directions.

name: Blunt Grind
description: Grind where riders starts on one side of obstacle, jumps, and grinds the opposite side

name: Body Varial
description: feet leave pedals, body turns 180 degree relative to unicycle, feet land on pedals

name: Boom Boom Flip
description: Flip, one footer, over flip
notes: It was named like this due to the sound it makes. The catch with the back foot (one footer) for the first boom followed by the overflip, second boom.

name: Brake Coasting
description: riding forward with no feet on the pedals, but a brake engaged to maintain balance (requires unicycle with a brake)

name: Branch Flip
description: flip with the hand while balancing with one foot on the seatpost and the saddle
notes: I do not know if anyone has already done this.

name: Brill Whip
description: From hop on tire, seat is thrown backward so that seat does one revolution around wheel in the plane perpendicular to the wheel, feet land on tire
notes: Landed only once

name: Brink Spin
description: rear tire grab followed by a unispin

name: Buda Flip
description: In to in x up outflip with a x up anti side trapped inside

name: Caught
description: feet land on pedals/cranks/tire and trick is completed while unicycle is still mid-air

name: Caveman Mount
description: rider runs holding uni saddle or saddle handle in one hand, and tire in other hand, jumps and lets go of wheel, lands on uni (can also be caught in air)

name: Clapper Grind
description: grind where rider claps hands during grind

name: Coasting
description: Riding forward with no feet on the pedals, generally with one or both feet on the frame

name: Corona Flip
description: a seat-in to seat-in 180 antiside with a flip

name: Corona Double Flip
description: a seat-in to seat-in 180 antiside with a double flip
notes: NOTE: people have landed antiside double flips before (Krisz Kovacs landed an antiside triple flip in the This Fire video), but not in the corona flip style (seat-in to seat-in)

name: Crank Flip
description: feet leave pedals, wheel does 1 rotation forwards, feet land on pedals
notes: One of the foundational tricks

name: Crank grab
description: Jumping up to tire on an obstacle from the crank

name: Crank Idle
description: idle with one foot on a pedal and the other foot on the crank on the same side of the unicycle

name: Crank Stall
description: landing on an object with the crank and spending a moment in this position

name: Cross Jumping
description: Jumping with crossed legs

name: Cross Leg Riding
description: Riding with crossed legs

name: Crossover flip
description: jump up, bring front foot behind/over the tire, kick back pedal with front foot to initiate back crank flip, land back on pedals

name: Cross hick side under flip
description: jump up, bring front foot behind/over the tire, kick back pedal with front foot to initiate back crank flip, then 180 side around front leg
notes: from Scott Julian's video Too Close To See

name: Cross hick side under double flip
description: scotty flip with an extra flip
notes: from Scott Julian's video Too Close To See

name: Crossing dolphins
description: Both feet doing dolphins but in oposite directions through the ring
notes: Name ivarial invented by Emile Themelin, third to land the trick, second was Scotty

name: Daiki Walk
description: stand up wheel walk seat on side (pushing foot is closer to the saddle)
notes: *NOT invented by Daiki Izumida, but the trick has been named after him by Western unicyclists: http://www.unicyclist.com/forums/showthread.php?t=63996

name: Decade
description: Backside 360 body varial

name: Decade double flip
description: Decade + double flip

name: Decade flip
description: Decade + Flip

name: Decade secret side
description: 360 hoptwist + 360 secret side in opposite direction

name: Dolphin flip
description: hold the front and back of the saddle. While doing a crankflip, pull one leg between your two arms, over the saddle, then land back on pedals/cranks

name: donkey hick
description: Donkey kick + 180 unispin

name: donkey kick
description: SIF, one foot on the frame, one foot on the tire, kicking the tire to make the wheel rotate 1 revolution backward, land back to pedals

name: donkey trey
description: Donkey kick + 360 unispin

name: Double Back Flip
description: feet leave pedals, wheel does 2 rotations backwards, feet land on pedals

name: Double Flip
description: Crank flip with 2 rotations

name: Double Flip Over Rail
description: grind on a rail to double crank flip occuring over the rail, rider lands on other side of rail

name: Double Leg Wrap
description: one foot leaves the pedal/crank/tire, wraps around seat twice, and lands back on pedal/crank/tire

name: Double Rev
description: wheel leaves ground, feet pedal the wheel through two revolutions, wheel lands on ground

name: Double Swivel Grind
description: pedal grind where wheel does 2 full revolutions during grind

name: Early Flip
description: Walk the Dog except before the wheel rotation is completed, tire leaves ground and feet land on pedals in the air
notes: related, yet different, trick = Pressure Flip

name: Fakie
description: indicates trick begins with unicycle traveling backward

name: Fakie Change
description: sex change while riding backwards

name: Fakie Flip
description: back flip while riding backwards
notes: This definition has mostly reached consensus, but some people believe this should be a forward crank flip while riding backwards, and that usage may still persist

name: Fifth antiside flip
description: 540 antiside spin + flip

name: Fifth antiside double flip
description: 540 antiside spin + double flip
notes: Has anyone landed this beside Krisz Kovacs and Eli Brill?

name: Fifth Double Flip
description: 540 unispin + double flip

name: Fifth Flip
description: 540 unispin + crank flip

name: Fifth kick flip
description: fifth flip but the wheel rotation is produced by your foot kicking the tire

name: Fifth Quad Flip
description: 540 unispin + quad flip

name: Fifth Triple Flip
description: 540 unispin + triple flip

name: Fifth secret side flip
description: 540 secret side spin + crank flip

name: Finger Backflip
description: holding seat in front, jump off pedals, grab front pedal and pull it backwards to initiate backflip, then land back on pedals

name: Finger flip
description: crankflip where you flip the wheel using your hand by pushing the front pedal forward

name: Finger inflip
description: crankflip where you flip the wheel using your hand by pushing the front pedal forward, followed by an inspin

name: Firecracker
description: riding down stairs quickly
notes: Term comes from skateboarding, where the sound of the skateboard wheels on the stairs sounds like a firecracker

name: Flag flip
description: 270 unispin + crankflip to foot jam

name: Flag spin
description: 270 unispin to footjam

name: Flip Over Rail
description: grind on a rail to crank flip occuring over the rail, rider lands on other side of rail

name: Flip Under Flip
description: crank flip + under flip

name: Flip under fulloutflip
description: crankflip + under fulloutflip

name: Flip under outflip
description: crankflip + under outflip

name: foot plant
description: When a rider jumps off the unicycle takes a step on his foot and then jump back on the unicycle

name: Forward scuff coast
description: One footed seat in front forward coasting

name: Forward scuff glide
description: One footed seat in front forward gliding

name: Frame balance
description: saddle and tyre touching ground (no pedals touching ground!!) standing on the frame

name: Full Out Back flip
description: full out flip with backwards wheel rotation

name: Full out backside back flip
description: Full out side back flip + backside

name: Full out backside flip
description: Full out backside + crankflip

name: Full out backside kickflip
description: Full out backside + kick flip

name: Full out backside middle flip
description: out backside spin, overflip, in spin, land back on pedals
notes: in the video (see link) Scotty and Levi both do this trick between 5:18 and 5:46

name: Full out backside spin
description: Starting seat in, a 360 unispin + backside (360 spins out from behind your leg, the leg wrap and spin are going in the same direction)

name: Full Out Flip
description: Full out spin + flip

name: Full out middle flip
description: outspin, overflip, in spin, land back on pedals

name: Full out side double flip
description: Full out side spin + double flip

name: Full out side flip
description: Full out side spin + flip

name: Full out side spin
description: 360 side spin starting seat in, ending seat in

name: Full Out Spin
description: 360 unispin starting seat in, ending seat in

name: Full Varial Back Flip
description: Full Varial Flip with backwards wheel rotation

name: Full Varial Flip
description: Full out flip + 180 twist

name: Full X Up
description: jump off pedals, spin unicycle 360 degrees, spin 360 opposite direction, land back on pedals

name: Full X Up Under Double
description: jump off pedals, spin unicycle 360 degrees, kick the back pedal to complete 2 full back revolutions (under double flip), spin 360 degrees in the opposite direction, land back on pedals

name: Gliding
description: One foot wheel walk with enough speed that the tire glides under the rider's foot

name: Goodnight Combo
description: 360 unispin / rolling wrap / backstepover roll / foot change / varial roll / foot change / rolling wrap / back inward varial roll / back x roll / 360 unispin / inward varial roll / 540 unispin
notes: THIS IS ONE EXCEPTION BECAUSE THIS IS SUCH A FAMOUS AND STANDARDIZED COMBO. OTHER THAN THIS, NO COMBOS SHOULD BE ADDED TO THE TRICKTIONARY

name: Grind
description: pedal/crank/bearing cap/frame slides on an object other than the ground (generally pedal and/or crank)

name: Half Cab
description: fakie 180 twist

name: Hand Back flip (seat in)
description: seat in no footer, hand initiates one backwards wheel rotation either by grabbing or slapping the tire, feet land on pedals.

name: Hand Back flip (seat out)
description: seat out no footer, hand initiates tire rotation, wheel does one backwards rotation, feet land on pedals. This version is done seat out, with the free hand grabbing the tire just behind the crown of the frame. See Hot Dog flip for a more advanced version of this trick.

name: Hand Flip
description: seat in no footer, hand initiates tire rotation (usually by slapping the tire, not grabbing), wheel does one forward rotation, feet land on pedals

name: Hand outflip
description: no footer, hand initiates tire rotation, wheel does one forward rotation + outspin, feet land on pedals

name: Hand fulloutflip
description: no footer, hand initiates tire rotation, wheel does one forward rotation + a fulloutspin , feet land on pedals

name: hand plant
description: When a rider used his hand to jump or push themselves

name: Hand Wheel Walk
description: Wheel is pushed with the hands, while feet are either on the frame or extended

name: Handrail Grind
description: wheel leaves ground, pedal or crank lands on a handrail (in a real urban environment, i.e. not a skatepark), pedal/crank slides down the rail

name: Hard Slide
description: grind with cranks vertical such that only a small part of the upward-facing crank near the axle is in contact with the obstacle

name: Haunster Backflip
description: no footer, push back pedal down with free hand to initiate back crankflip

name: Haunster Flip
description: no footer, then grab the back pedal with your hand and pull it forward to initiate a crankflip, land back on pedals/cranks with seat out
notes: first landed at UniCon 21

name: Haunster Inflip
description: haunster flip followed by an inspin (no footer, then grab back pedal and pull up to initiate a crankflip, then inspin)

name: Haunster Hot Dog Flip
description: haunster flip but you reach behind your back leg (no footer, then hand reaches behind back leg to grab back pedal, pull the pedal forward to initiate a crankflip)

name: Hick antiside flip
description: 180 antiside spin + crank flip

name: Hick Back kick flip
description: 180 unispin while kicking the tire to do a back flip

name: Hick Back Stutter Flip
description: hick back + overflip

name: Hick Double Flip
description: 180 unispin + double flip starting seat in front

name: Hick Flip
description: 180 unispin + crank flip starting and ending seat in front
notes: Shaun Johanneson landed the trick first, but after a friendly competition Kelly Hickman did it down a bigger set of stairs and Shaun named the trick after Kelly Hickman. http://www.unicyclist.com/forums/showpost.php?p=810125&postcount=7

name: Hick Kick Flip
description: Hickflip but the wheel rotation speed is produced by a kick of the tire

name: Hick over flip
description: 180 unispin + overflip

name: Hick Quad Flip
description: 180 unispin + quad flip starting seat in front

name: Hick Quint Flip
description: 180 unispin + quint flip starting seat in front

name: Hick Side Flip
description: 180 side spin + crankflip

name: Hick Side Double Flip
description: 180 side spin + double flip

name: Hick Side Triple Flip
description: 180 side spin + triple flip

name: Hick Side Quad Flip
description: 180 side spin + quad flip

name: Hick Stutter Flip
description: hick flip + underflip

name: Hick Triple Flip
description: 180 unispin + triple flip starting seat in front

name: Hick Under Flip
description: 180 unispin + underflip

name: Hop
description: tire leaves ground with rider on unicycle

name: Hop on Wheel
description: Hopping with the unicycle perpendicular to the rider, both feet on the tire, holding the seat

name: Hop Over Rail Grind
description: grind where rider exits grind by hopping over the rail and riding out on the other side

name: Hot Dog Flip
description: starting seat out, hop off pedals, hand reaches behind front leg, grabs tire, and initiates a backflip, land back on pedals/cranks seat out

name: Huge flip
description: Huge spin + flip

name: Huge Spin
description: 540 unispin + 180 body varial in the same direction

name: Idling
description: staying in once place by moving the wheel back and forth less than one revolution

name: In fifth Over flip
description: a 540 inspin followed by an overflip

name: In Over Out Flip
description: inspin, overflip, outspin

name: inside crank jam
description: When the rider jams his foot on the crank, with the inside of his foot towards the frame

name: inside jam
description: When the rider jams his foot on the tire, with the inside of his foot towards the frame

name: Inward Big Spin
description: 360 unispin + 180 body varial in opposite directions

name: Inward rolling wrap
description: when in a normal rollingwrap the seat starts its way around your two legs by going out in the front, the inward starts by going out back like it was a backsidespin, wraps then, in the oposite direction as a none inward starting on the same foot, around both of your legs and back in under your butt, unless you keep lining them in wich case it ends up being the same thing as lining switch rollingwraps

name: Inward Small double flip
description: Inward small flip with 2 wheel rotation

name: Inward Small Flip
description: Inward small spin + flip

name: Inward small side double flip
description: Inward small side flip with 2 wheel rotation

name: Inward small side flip
description: Inward small spin + side + flip

name: Inward small side quadflip
description: Inward small side flip with 4 wheel rotations
notes: small and quad are not words that go together

name: Inward small side spin
description: Inward small spin + side (360 side spin + body varial in opposite direction)

name: Inward small side triple flip
description: Inward small side flip with 3 wheel rotations

name: Inward Small Spin
description: 360 unispin + 180 body varial in opposite directions (uni spins 180 degrees relative to ground)

name: Inward Small triple flip
description: Inward small flip with 3 wheel rotation

name: inward varial spin
description: inward small spin from seat in (a fullout spin with a body varial in the opposite direction)

name: inward varial back flip
description: inward varial flip with backwards wheel rotation

name: inward varial double flip
description: Inward varial flip with 2 wheel rotation

name: inward varial flip
description: inward varial spin + crank flip

name: Inward Varial kick flip
description: Inward varial flip but the wheel rotation speed is produced by a kick of the tire

name: Inward Varial Roll
description: A varial roll where your back leg wraps around the seat during the motion of moving to the outside crank position
notes: Was originally named 53s as it was at the 53rd second in the video it was first shown. Read Samiaul's post https://forum.monocycle.info/viewtopic.php?f=20&t=5991&start=60

name: Inward X Roll
description: X roll but the foot crosses in front of the seat rather than over

name: Ivar Coast
alternateNames: forward coast (as a sibbling to the sidecoast that is the same thing but body twisted so side faces traveling direction)
description: no feet straight forward, hands like in a scuff
notes: Tim Desmet made two revs before but through 2017 Ivar and also Ayrton took it from three revs to safety

name: Jelly Roll
description: Begin on your front crank in outside crank position. Roll forward half revolution and rotate your body away from the uni (e.g., if you ride right foot in front, you will turn to your right) Your free leg goes over the tire, between the frame and your other leg, and that foot will land on the other crank in the inside crank position (this foot will be facing the opposite direction as your other foot) then roll a half revolution backwards
notes: not pronounced like Jelle's name. It is pronounced jelly.

name: Jump Mount
description: jump onto your uni!

name: Kick Flip
description: no footer, kick the tire with your foot to initiate 1 wheel rotation, land back on pedals/cranks

name: Kick Up Mount
description: unicycle starts laying on ground, rider puts one foot on the pedal/crank and uses the other foot to kick/lift the saddle up to normal riding position, then rides away

name: King Flip
description: a full out flip and a 360 hoptwist in the same direction

name: Kinked Rail Grind
description: grind on a rail that changes from sloped to flat or sloped to a different degree of slope

name: Knee bounce
description: Land with your upper shins on the tire
notes: the combo in the video example is 90 unispin / knee bounce / 270 unispin

name: Knee jam
description: jam one of your shins between the crown of the frame and the top of the tire

name: Knee Kick Flip
description: hick kick flip where the wheel rotation is produced by kicking the tire with your knee (the spot just under your knee, above your shin)
notes: ...may be one of the most disgusting tricks ever landed. - Dan Colvin

name: Knee step over
description: Like a traditional step over, but your knee touches the tire instead of your foot

name: Late
description: trick begins after the rider and/or unicycle have left the ground, preferably at the peak or after the peak of the jump

name: Leg Wrap
description: one foot leaves the pedal/crank/tire, wraps around seat, and lands back on pedal/crank/tire

name: Leg Wrap Grind
description: grind where one of the legs wraps around the seat mid-grind

name: Leg Wrap Swivel Grind
description: swivel grind with a leg wrap

name: Levitation Roll
description: a foot moves in contact with the tyre from around ground level up to the crown, moving the unicycle at the same time as causing the body on top of the foot to lift up, levitate, in a way

name: Lollipop
description: crank stall where rider does a full wheel revolution with the crank and/or pedal constantly in contact with the obstacle; for half the revolution, the pedal is in contact with the obstacle, for the other half revolution, only a small portion of the crank is in contact as the wheel spins

name: Ludwig Roll
description: a forward x roll where the seat is passing behind your back like in a rolling wrap, but your leg moves between the frame and the leg already standing on the crank

name: In flip under flip
description: In-flip + underflip

name: Macro Spin
description: 900 unispin + 180 body varial in the same direction

name: Mammoth Spin
description: 720 unispin + 180 body varial in the same direction

name: Maxwhip
description: feet leave pedals, seat is thrown backwards and whips around wheel one full revolution, feet land on pedals

name: Mega backside jump
description: from the outside crank position, jump up, bring free leg in front of the seat and wrap around behind the seat like for a backside jump, land back on pedals/cranks (typically done after a roll)
notes: In the Unicycling Society of America Flatland Levels, mega side jump is listed as a trick in Level 8. However, by the definition they give this is actually mega backside jump, a different trick from mega side jump.

name: Mega side jump
description: from the outside crank position, jump up, bring free leg behind the seat and wrap around in front of the seat like for a side jump, land back on pedals/cranks (typically done after a roll)

name: Monkey
description: Both feet passing between arms in same direction as one hand holds the tire and one the saddle

name: monkey jump
description: Jump both feet between hands holding saddle on each end

name: monkey kick
description: HOW with one of the feet pushing on the tire to make the wheel rotate 1 revolution, land back to pedals

name: monkey kick on tire
description: Monkey kick but land back to tire

name: Ninth Flip
description: 900 Unispin + Crankflip

name: Ninth Side Flip
description: 900 side spin + crank flip

name: No Footer
description: feet leave pedals, feet return to pedals

name: No Footer Tire Grab
description: no footer + tire grab

name: No Hander
description: hop where seat hand is released and both arms are stretched out to the side while in mid-air

name: One foot
description: Ride with one foot

name: one foot coast
description: roll

name: One footed wheel walk
description: Wheel walk with one foot on the frame and the other one on the tire propelling the unicycle forward

name: One Footer
description: hop, while in the air one foot leaves the pedal, return free foot to pedal upon landing

name: One footer overflip
description: One footer + overflip

name: Out
description: spin trick that starts from seat in between the rider's legs (seat in)

name: Out 540 unispin
description: 540 unispin from seat in

name: Out 720 unispin
description: 720 unispin from seat in

name: Out antiside over flip
description: outspin toward front foot, kick front pedal with front foot (over flip), wrap other leg around seat

name: Out Back Flip
description: out flip with backwards wheel rotation

name: Out backside spin
description: starting seat in, jump up, spin 180 degrees out from behind your leg, land back on pedals with seat out in front of you

name: out backside flip
description: out backside spin + crank flip

name: out backside double flip
description: out backside spin + double flip

name: out backside triple flip
description: out backside spin + triple flip

name: out backside overflip
description: out backside spin followed by an over flip
notes: First landed by Scott Julian and Levi Prindle in the same session at UniCon21

name: Out double back flip
description: Out back flip with 2 wheel rotation

name: Out double flip
description: Out flip with 2 wheel rotation

name: Out Fifth Back Flip
description: Fifth back flip from seat in

name: Out Fifth Double Flip
description: fifth double flip from seat in

name: Out Fifth Flip
description: fifthflip from seat in

name: Out Fifth Triple Flip
description: fifth triple flip from seat in

name: Out Flip
description: out spin + crank flip

name: Out Fourth flip
description: out 450 + crankflip

name: Out Fourth doubleflip
description: out 450 + doubleflip

name: Out ninth flip
description: ninth flip from seat in

name: Out quad flip
description: Out flip with 4 wheel rotation

name: Out Over In Flip
description: outspin, underflip, inspin opposite direction

name: Out Sej Double Flip
description: 720 unipsin + double flip from seat in

name: Out Sej Flip
description: 720 unipsin + flip from seat in

name: Out sex change
description: Sex change from seat in

name: Out sex change backflip
description: Sex change from seat in with backwards wheel rotation

name: Out Spin
description: 180 unispin starting seat in

name: Out triple flip
description: Out flip with 3 wheel rotation

name: outisde crank jam
description: When the rider jams his foot on the crank, with the outside of his foot towards the frame

name: Outside inward varial stepover roll
description: First half outsideroll forward, then put free foot on tire/crown to step up on it as you twist your body 180 degrees, then finish like your standard back roll stepover

name: outside jam
description: When the rider jams his foot on the tire, with the outside of his foot towards the frame

name: Outside Push Mush
description: Ideling on crank, outside position, pushing wheel in both directions

name: Outside Roll
description: Standing on outside crank pointing forward, push tire once to move half rev forward, push tire second time and lift standing foot at the same time (little jump) half rev forward

name: Outside roll flip
description: Outside roll where the second half is a jump in where the wheel rotates, most standard 1,5 revolution crankflip

name: Over Blunt Grind
description: grind where mid-grind the wheel goes over the obstacle and the opposite crank/pedal grinds the other side of the obstacle

name: Over Double Flip
description: Over flip with 2 rotations

name: Over Flip
description: feet leave the pedals, while the unicycle wheel is in mid-air, the rider's front foot kicks the forward pedal causing the wheel to do one rotation forwards, feet land on pedals

name: Over Triple Flip
description: Over flip with 3 rotations

name: Pedal Flip
description: pedal is spun on its axle by either foot or hand

name: Pedal grab
description: Jumping with the pedal landing on an obstacle

name: Pedal Stall
description: landing on an object with the pedal and spending a moment in this position

name: Pre-Hop
description: smaller hop made to compress the tire upon landing, enabling a larger second hop using the rebound of the tire

name: Pressure Flip
description: feet leave pedals, push the unicycle forward on the ground to initiate wheel rotation, lift uni so that wheel completes rotation in the air, feet land on pedals

name: Prince Flip
description: 360 hoptwist + out flip in the same direction

name: The Prindle*
description: jump off the pedals and let the unicycle fall to one side, catching the seat with one foot and the other foot on the crank. Then launch the seat to the other side, behind your leg, so that it does a 180 backside spin. Then catch the seat when you land back on the pedals/cranks
notes: *naming yet to be confirmed by the creator

name: Push Mush
description: Ideling on crank, inside position, pushing tire in both directions

name: Quad Back Flip
description: crank flip where wheel does 4 revolutions forward

name: Quad Flip
description: Crank flip with 4 rotations

name: Quad Leg Wrap
description: four leg wraps in a row

name: Quad Swivel Grind
description: pedal grind where wheel does 4 full revolutions during grind

name: Quint Flip
description: Crank flip with 5 rotations

name: Quint Swivel Grind
description: pedal grind where wheel does 5 full revolutions during grind

name: Rail Ride
description: jump to sloped rail, tire lands on rail, rider rides the entirity or portion of the rail

name: The Rapture
description: start a full-out-backside-spin, then after 180 degrees you kick the front pedal with your back foot to initiate a crank flip, then complete the spin with the last 180 degrees and land back on pedals

name: Rear Tire Grab
description: hop with free hand grabbing rear side of tire in mid-air

name: Rev
description: wheel leaves ground, feet pedal the wheel through one revolution, wheel lands on ground

name: Rev Backrev
description: Rev then back Rev before landing on the ground
notes: please we need the video of this one

name: Rev double flip
description: Hop, do a half rev,then let go of the pedals so they flip 2,5 rotations, land

name: Rev Fullout flip
description: hop, do a half rev, then let go of the pedals so they flip 1.5 revolutions while spinning 360, land

name: Rev triple flip
description: Hop, do a half rev, then let go fo the pedals so they flip 3,5 rotations, land

name: Reverse Rolling Wrap
description: starts similar to a backroll, but your hand should be on the handle of the seat. after the first half roll backward, the free foot (front foot) goes to the other crank. The seat is passed behind your back to your other hand and there will be a moment when both feet are on the cranks and both hands are on the seat. Then pass the seat to your other hand as your front foot rolls the second half revolution backward (this may sound like a very complicated explanation but just imagine a rolling wrap in reverse)

name: Reverse Side Jump
description: both feet leave pedals, one leg wraps inward around seat, feet land on pedals

name: Reverse Side Flip
description: reverse side jump + crankflip

name: Reverse Storm Roll
description: storm roll done in the reverse order

name: Revflip
description: Hop, do a half rev,then let go of the pedals so they flip 1,5 rotations, land

name: Rewind
description: hop, wheel leaves ground and initiates a crankflip, then once the wheel is fully around use your free hand to pull the wheel in the opposite direction until it is back to where it started, land.

name: Riding
description: pedaling while maintaining balance

name: Rhythm Roll
description: with seat in front, roll forward a half revolution on the front crank, then place other foot on the other crank and roll the second half revolution forward

name: Robot Walk
description: pedal grind where wheel does one full revolution during grind and both feet stay on pedals at all times
notes: As seen in Universe 2

name: Rolling
description: indicates trick is done while riding forward (as opposed to static)

name: Rolling Mount
description: mounting the unicycle while walking forward without stopping the wheel

name: Rolling Wrap
description: a rhythm roll and seat wrap happening simultaneously (half roll forward while wrapping the seat away from your front foot, behind your back. As you switch the seat to your other hand behind your back, your free foot moves to the other crank. Do the second half roll with that other foot while wrapping the seat back around in the same direction, and end with the seat in front of you)
notes: While wrap roll can be used as an alternate name for rolling wrap, it can also refer to a different roll... see Wrap Roll below

name: Rolloroll
description: rolling through the half of the rev where the crank points upwards by standing on the rollodisc

name: Schulze Walk
description: propell unicycle forward with feet on cranks and seat in back

name: Scissor Backside Flip
description: out backside spin around one leg followed by a backside jump around other leg, with a crankflip happening simultaneously

name: Scissor Side Spin
description: 180 side spin around one leg followed by 180 side spin around the other leg (opposite spinning direction)
notes: If you know of a better video example of the Scissor Side spin, please feel free to replace the video link

name: Scoop Flip
description: foot plant on obstacle, hit pedal on an obstacle to initiate wheel rotation, wheel does one rotation, land on pedals

name: Scuff coast
description: One footed seat in front backwards coasting

name: Scuff coast toetwist
description: Transition between scuff backwards inside to outside forward or from backwards outside to inside forward by twisting around on your toes on the crown

name: Scuff glide
description: One footed seat in front backwards gliding

name: Scuff walk
description: Repeted short scuffglides powered by kicks on the wheel

name: Seat bounce
description: starting seat out in front with feet on cranks or pedals, throw the seat forward so that the handle hits the ground and the seat bounces back up (SEE NOTE)
notes: WARNING: while this trick can be addictively fun and entertaining, do not do it too much or you can shatter your seat handle!

name: Seat drag
description: Riding with the seat dragging on the ground behind you

name: Seat drop
description: standing with feet on cranks, angle your front foot into the spokes/wheel a little bit, so that when you let go of the seat and allow it to drop forward, your foot stops it at about a 45° angle. See how long you can balance before grabbing the seat back up again

name: Seat Drop Grind
description: grind where a seat drop is performed mid-grind

name: Seat grab
description: lands on a object with the saddle, so it supports the rider, like a pedal or crank grab

name: Seat In
description: the seat is in between the rider's legs

name: Seat In Back
description: seat in behind; seat not between the riders' legs

name: Seat In Front
description: trick that initiates with the seat in front of the rider, not between the rider's legs

name: Seat In Front Hop
description: hop with the seat in front of the rider

name: Seat Out
description: seat is in front; seat is NOT in between the rider's legs

name: Seat pivot
description: Only seat is in ground and you spin

name: Seat push
description: Riding with the seat being pushed on the ground in front of you

name: Seat Whip
description: When the seat(and frame) whips around the wheel, forward or back (the wheel is not rotating)

name: Seat Whip Crank Grab
description: When the seat(and frame) whips around the wheel, forward or back, while one or both of the cranks are on an obstacle
notes: Dan Heaton landed this from crank grab

name: Seat Whip Grind
description: grind with a seat whip done mid-grind while the cranks stays in contact with the ledge/rail

name: Seat Wrap
description: leg around (leg 1) to seat in back to leg around (leg 2)

name: Secret Side
description: unispin where seat of the unicycle wraps around behind both legs (to the side, behind, other side, and back in front). Basically, a sidespin followed by a backside spin, in the same jump

name: Secret side flip
description: secret side jump + crank flip

name: Secret side jump
description: jump off pedals, seat wraps around one leg, behind both legs, back in front (no spin of seat)

name: Sej double flip
description: 720 unispin + double flip

name: Sej flip
description: 720 unispin + crank flip
notes: Shaun Johanneson landed it first and named it SEJ flips. It stands for Shaun Eric Johanneson flip. Although it was clearly done by Shaun first and he clearly stated the name of the tricks, some riders insist on calling the trick seventh flip.

name: Sej quad flip
description: 720 unispin + quad flip

name: sej triple flip
description: 720 Unispin + triple crankflip

name: sej secret side flip
description: 720 secret side + crank flip

name: sej side flip
description: 720 side spin + crank flip

name: Sej side double flip
description: 720 side spin + double flip

name: Sex Change
description: body varial + crank flip
notes: This trick has a weird name as it's a flip trick but does not finish with the word flip

name: sex change back flip
description: Sex change with backwards wheel rotation

name: Sex Change Double Flip
description: body varial + double flip

name: Sex change kick flip
description: Sex Change but the wheel rotation speed is produced by a kick of the tire

name: Sex Change Triple Flip
description: body varial + triple flip

name: Sext flip
description: Hop, cranks flip for 6 revolutions, land
notes: Done off of a ledge

name: Shiftie
description: hop where the wheel is twisted perpendicular to the direction of travel in mid-air and returned to the plane of travel upon landing

name: Side
description: both legs of rider are on one side of the unicycle during or at some point duirng the trick

name: Side coast
description: hands on saddle, feet in air, side of body facing the direction coast is traveling

name: Side Double Flip
description: side jump + double crank flip

name: Side Flip
description: side jump + crank flip

name: Side Hop
description: Hopping with one foot on the opposite pedal. The other leg is crossed behind you on the tire, or ext.

name: Side Jump
description: both feet leave pedals, one leg wraps around seat, feet land on pedals

name: Side Mount
description: one feet on pedal in lowest position, step up and move leg via the front of your seat to the other pedal

name: Side Quad Flip
description: quad flip + side jump

name: Side Ride
description: on the side of unicycle riding one foot (with foot that is closest to the wheel)

name: Side Triple Flip
description: side jump + triple crank flip

name: Sideways Wheel Walk
description: Standing on the tire, unicycle perpendicular to the rider, wheel walk

name: Small flip
description: Small spin + flip

name: Small side flip
description: Small side spin + flip

name: Small side spin
description: Small spin + side

name: Small Spin
description: 180 unispin + 180 body varial in the same direction

name: Smiley Walk
description: Seat in back wheel walk, while supporting your weight in your arms

name: Spencer Flip
description: On BC wheel, start riding upstairs, jump off the platforms, and land back on them after they've flipped down to the normal position

name: Stand up backwards wheel walk
description: Standing on the frame while one foot pushes you backwards (the foot is behind the frame)

name: Stand up gliding
description: Stand up wheel walk with enough speed that the tire glides underneath the rider's foot

name: Stand up wheel walk
description: Standing on the frame while one foot pushes you forwards (the foot is in front of the frame)

name: Static
description: indicates trick begins from a static position (i.e. the unicycle is not rolling forwards or backwards)

name: Static Trey Quad
description: 360 unspin + Quad Crankflip (from static position)

name: steeze coast
description: A coast started from the steeze jam position

name: Steeze Hands
description: placing the hands behind the head upon the completion of a trick, hence increasing the level of steaze

name: steeze jam
description: Basically an outside jam with 2 feet

name: Stillstand
description: staying in one place on the unicycle without idling or hopping

name: Stomach balance
description: saddle on your stomach hip or thighs, stay in balance sideways using your hands on the wheel and front to back by having your whole body doing like the arms in a normal stillstand

name: Storm Roll
description: Begin in outside roll position. After the first push (one half rev roll forward), with the seat in front of you, twist your body away from the unicycle in a 180 body varial and place your back foot on the other crank in the inside position. Then use your front foot and brace it against the tire while you continue the body varial to make it 360. during this transition you switch your back foot around on the same crank to be in the outside roll position. Then finish the roll by moving the last half rev forward on your back foot. Whew. That's a long description. Intimidated yet?
notes: Don't worry, it's even harder than the description makes it seem

name: Stutter 360 backrev
description: 180 backrev to late 180

name: Stutterbackflip
description: Backflip + underflip

name: Stutter Flip
description: Crankflip + Over Flip

name: Stutter Grind
description: grind where pedal/crank leaves obstacle mid-grind and then lands back on obstacle to continue grind

name: Stutter rev
description: Rev + late rev

name: Suicide Mount
description: unicycle is balanced on ground, rider removes hands and feet from unicycle, riders jumps onto unicycle

name: Suicide Spin
description: unispin where the seat comes out from behind one leg, wraps around in front of both legs, and around the other leg (Basically, a backside spin followed by a side spin, in the same jump)

name: Super Roll
description: Leg wrap to rolling wrap to leg wrap

name: Superman
description: one hand holds seat and other hand holds tire while legs are kicked out backwards, creating a horizontal body position like Superman flying
notes: kick legs higher for extra style points

name: Switch
description: With the less comfortable foot forward or hand on the seat (used by itself usually refers to foot position)

name: Switch Foot
description: When the rider's less comfortable foot is in front

name: Switch hand
description: When the rider's less comfortable hand is used

name: Switcheroo Grind
description: rider jumps from normal foot position, does a half rotation, grinds in a switch foot position

name: Swivel Grind
description: pedal grind where wheel does one full revolution during grind, generally by pumping the unicycle with the hand holding the handle

name: Swivel Rewind
description: grind where wheel rotates one direction, then rotates the opposite direction during the grind

name: Swivel Rewind Replay
description: grind where wheel rotates one direction, then rotates the opposite direction, then rotates the original direction during the grind

name: Tenth Flip
description: 1080 unispin + crank flip

name: Tenth Side Flip
description: 1080 side spin + crank flip

name: Tic Out-Tac
description: half crankflip + switch under out half flip

name: Tic Tac
description: half crankflip + switch under half flip

name: Tic Tac Double
description: half crankflip + switch under 1.5 flip

name: Tic Double Tac
description: 1.5 crankflip + switch under half flip

name: Tico Tico
description: pedal grab to pedal grab

name: Tic X Tac
description: hick half flip + switch over hick half flip (spinning in opposite direction)

name: Tire grab
description: Grabing the front of the tire with the hand during a hop

name: Tire grab body varial
description: grabbing unicycle by the tire (and optionally also frame) and doing a 180 body varial

name: Tire Grab Grind
description: grind + tire grab

name: Toeslide
description: Sliding the tip of your foot/feet over the ground or preferebly floor in stuff like onefootrides, forward scuffs, nopushrolls, seat pirouettes, etc

name: Travolta
description: Jump up, spin 630 degrees, catch the seat in the air, pull it back the other way 270° degrees, land back on pedals. You can't do it. Why even try.

name: Trey antiside flip
description: 360 antiside spin + crank flip

name: Trey Double Flip
description: 360 unispin + double flip

name: Trey Flip
description: 360 unispin + crank flip

name: Trey flip under flip
description: Trey flip + under flip

name: Trey flip under outflip
description: trey flip + underflip + 180 unispin (opposite direction)

name: Trey kick flip
description: Treyflip but the wheel rotation speed is produced by a kick of the tire

name: Trey back kick flip
description: Trey back flip but the wheel rotation is produced by a kick of the tire

name: Trey middleflip
description: 180 unispin + overflip +180 unispin

name: Trey over double flip
description: 360 unispn + over double flip

name: Trey over flip
description: 360 Unispin + overflip
notes: The naming convention of overflips don't make sense as it doesn't describe the trick directly, but it is generally accepted that a trey over flip is 360 unispin + over flip. When you want to specify a flip in the first part of the trick, simply add flip. Eg Trey flip underflip = trey flip + underflip.

name: Trey Quad Flip
description: 360 unispin + quad flip

name: Trey Quint Flip
description: 360 unispin + quint flip

name: Trey side double flip
description: Trey side flip with 2 rotations of the wheel

name: Trey side flip
description: 360 side spin + flip

name: Trey side overflip
description: 360 side spin + overflip

name: Trey side quad flip
description: Trey side flip with 4 rotations of the wheel

name: Trey side triple flip
description: Trey side flip with 3 rotations of the wheel

name: Trey side underflip
description: 360 sidespin + underflip

name: Trey Triple Flip
description: 360 unispin + triple flip

name: Trey Under Double Flip
description: 360 Unispin + under double flip

name: Trey Under Flip
description: 360 unispin + underflip

name: Trey under outflip
description: 360 unispin + underflip + 180 unispin (opposite direction)

name: Trey under trey
description: 360 unispin + underflip + 360 unispin in opposite direction

name: Triple Back Flip
description: feet leave pedals, wheel does 3 rotations backwards, feet land on pedals

name: Triple Flip
description: crank flip where wheel does 3 revolutions forward

name: Triple Rev
description: wheel leaves ground, feet pedal the wheel through 3 revolutions, wheel lands on ground

name: Triple Swivel Grind
description: pedal grind where wheel does 3 full revolutions during grind

name: Under Flip
description: feet leave the pedals, while the unicycle wheel is in mid-air, the rider's back foot kicks the backward pedal causing the wheel to do one backward revolution, feet land on pedals

name: Under Double Flip
description: jump off pedals, then kick the back pedal with your back foot so that the wheel flips backward twice, then land back on pedals

name: Uni front roll
description: to do a front roll (gymnastics) with uni, ride, dive forward, roll on back, when the wheel hits the ground use momentum to return to upright, ride

name: Uni Transfer
description: jumping from one unicycle to another

name: Uni Whip
description: When the whole unicycle flips (forward or back) on its vertical axis

name: Uni-Somersault
description: Launch into air, become upside down, become rightside up again, land on ground, keep riding
notes: Only landed by a handful of riders. Adrien Delecroix, Max Schulze, Emile Mathieu, Tim Desmet and Nicolas Potier

name: Upstairs
description: On a BC wheel, ride on the bottoms of the platforms, while they are flipped up from their normal position

name: Vanflip
description: riding seat in, feet leave pedals, one foot comes forward and pushes the tire, wheel flips once, land back on pedals

name: Varial Double Flip
description: Varial flip with 2 wheel rotation

name: Varial Flip
description: From seat in, 180 unispin + 180 twist (body and unicycle spin in same direction) + flip

name: Varial Roll
description: Half rev rolling forward on the inside, twist free foot so you open to your front, place on the empty crank and roll a half rev backwards on the outside

name: Varial Triple Flip
description: Varial flip with 3 wheel rotation

name: Walk the Dog
description: Jump with speed and lead the uni rolling on the ground until you fall down back on it

name: wall plant
description: Foot plant or Tire plant on a straight or slanted wall

name: Wheel Walk
description: both feet push forward alternately on the tire, propelling the unicycle forward

name: Wolfgang roll
description: between outsiderolls you transition by passing the seat in front of you, and doing the crossing necessary for foot replacing on the side so that the new coming foot goes behind the leg you’re already standing on

name: Worm Roll
description: longer version of a levitationroll, rolling your whole leg towards the wheel instead of just the foot

name: Wrap Roll
description: a rolling wrap with an extra leg wrap after the first half roll

name: X roll
description: half outsideroll, cross free foot in front of standing foot (front of saddle) when at the other crank, free the other foot and roll on the outside on the new standing side

name: X rolling wrap
description: a forward x roll where the seat transition happens behind your back like in a rolling wrap, and your transitioning leg moves in front of the tire and the leg already standing on the crank

name: X Up
description: hop, spin a 180 unispin that is reversed 180 degrees in the opposite direction, land on pedals

name: X Up 360
description: hop, spin a 180 unispin, spin a 360 unispin in opposite direction, land on pedals

name: X Up 540
